summary: Iteration 38 - Dependency & Risk Safeguard System testing. All 30 backend tests passed. Frontend DependencyCard and PracticeDependencyCard components verified working correctly with proper styling and data display.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/catalog/COMPANY_CLOSURE/dependencies returns has_dependencies=true with 5 linked obligations and 3 high risks - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/COMPANY_FORMATION_SRL/dependencies returns has_dependencies=true with mandatory and conditional obligations - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/VAT_OPEN_PF/dependencies returns has_dependencies=true with INPS and EINVOICING links - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/ASSUNZIONE_DIP/dependencies returns linked obligations for busta paga, UniEmens, LUL - VERIFIED
GET /api/catalog/DICHIARAZIONE_SUCCESSIONE/dependencies returns IMU and imposta di registro links - VERIFIED
Pre-start endpoint includes dependencies block (GET /api/catalog/COMPANY_CLOSURE/pre-start?client_type=company) - VERIFIED
Dependencies endpoint returns correct structure: linked_obligations, risk_if_omitted, completion_integrity, mandatory_links, high_risks - VERIFIED
CreatePracticePage Phase 2 shows DependencyCard for COMPANY_CLOSURE (data-testid='dependency-card') - VERIFIED
DependencyCard shows linked obligations block (data-testid='linked-obligations-block') - VERIFIED
DependencyCard shows completion integrity block (data-testid='completion-integrity-block') - VERIFIED
PracticeDetailPage shows PracticeDependencyCard as expandable accordion (data-testid='practice-dependency-card', 'dependency-toggle') - VERIFIED
Procedures without dependencies do NOT show the card - VERIFIED (DOC_MISSING_REQUEST, INFO_CONTRIBUTI_MINIMI)
Obligation types styled correctly: mandatory=red, recommended=blue, conditional=amber - VERIFIED
Risk severities styled correctly: high=red, medium=amber, low=slate - VERIFIED
All 16 procedures in dependency_data.py return has_dependencies=true - VERIFIED
All UI text is in Italian as required - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing dependency data and practices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified the Dependency & Risk Safeguard System. Key verified: (1) dependency_data.py contains 16 procedures with dependency maps. (2) GET /api/catalog/{id}/dependencies endpoint returns correct structure with linked_obligations, risk_if_omitted, completion_integrity, mandatory_links, high_risks. (3) Pre-start endpoint includes dependencies block. (4) CreatePracticePage Phase 2 shows DependencyCard with all blocks (linked-obligations, risk, completion-integrity). (5) PracticeDetailPage shows PracticeDependencyCard as expandable accordion (collapsed by default). (6) Styling correct: mandatory=red, recommended=blue, conditional=amber for obligations; high=red, medium=amber, low=slate for risks. (7) Procedures without dependencies (internal procedures) correctly show has_dependencies=false and no card. (8) All UI in Italian.
